title: Too many ads
body: Every time I convert a file I get hit with three full screen ads. It is unusable now.

title: Ads everywhere
body: The app is buried in ads. I cannot even tap a button without an ad popping up first.

title: Ad overload
body: Would be five stars but the constant video ads before every conversion drive me crazy.

title: Painfully slow
body: Converting a single PDF to images takes almost a minute. My old app did it instantly.

title: So slow
body: The conversion is extremely slow on large PDFs. It froze twice while processing.

title: Slow and laggy
body: Batch conversion is so slow that I gave up and did it on my laptop instead.

title: PDF pages missing
body: When I convert a PDF to images it only exports the first page. The rest are gone.

title: Broken PDF export
body: PDF to image conversion produces blurry low resolution images. Text is unreadable.

title: Decent PDF tool
body: Turning PDFs into PNGs works but I wish I could pick the output resolution.

title: No batch support
body: I have 200 photos to compress and I have to do them one by one. Please add batch mode.

title: Batch please
body: Great app but there is no way to process multiple images at once. Huge time waster.

title: Bulk conversion needed
body: I need to convert whole folders at once and this only does one file at a time.

title: HEIC not supported
body: It refuses to open my iPhone HEIC photos. Says unsupported format every time.

title: HEIC problems
body: Cannot convert HEIC to JPG which is the only reason I downloaded this app.

title: No HEIC
body: Please support HEIC files. All my iPhone photos are HEIC and this app ignores them.

title: Compression ruins quality
body: The image compression makes everything look terrible even on the high quality setting.

title: Compression is okay
body: Compression works to shrink file size but there is no preview before I save.

title: Files too big
body: The compressed images are barely smaller than the originals. Not much compression at all.

title: Cannot share
body: There is no way to share the converted file directly to email or messaging apps.

title: Sharing broken
body: The share button does nothing. I have to dig through my files to find the output.

title: No cloud sharing
body: Wish I could share straight to Google Drive instead of saving then uploading manually.

title: Love it
body: Simple and does exactly what I need for quick JPG conversions. No complaints.

title: Great app
body: Fast and clean interface for converting my screenshots to PDF. Works perfectly.

title: Pretty good
body: Does the job for basic conversions. Would love more format options down the line.

title: Solid
body: Reliable for everyday image resizing. Has not crashed on me once in months of use.

title: Crashes constantly
body: The app crashes every single time I try to open a file larger than ten megabytes.

title: Keeps crashing
body: Crashed three times while converting a batch of photos. Lost all my progress.

title: Unstable
body: It crashes when I try to compress and share at the same time. Very frustrating.
